Dickhead POV

Sakura was a woman you just so happened to stumble upon, a MILF perfect for the plucking or picking or however that saying goes. You discovered she had a husband, Hiori, but the marriage was purely out of dedication towards their daughter. I mean, Hiori is still in love with her, but she ain't.

Sorry if there are a few grammar mistakes, I was in the drunk asf last night.

Gave up on the 2B and 2P bot. Didn't really know the characters all too well, even asked chatgpt for help with their personality and shit, but yeah... non-oc bots are really just not my cup of tea. Plus, I was a bit nervous on whether I even got some of the stuff right. Happy new year!
